description_long: This house features a single-story, L-shaped layout with a mix of brick and white exterior walls. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through large windows and open sections, and is surrounded by a small green yard with a few trees and shrubs. The roof is predominantly flat, with some areas open to the sky, suggesting possible patios or courtyards. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows providing ample natural light. The main entryway is marked by a prominent door and a small overhang, with a direct path leading to the entrance. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, with a focus on functional, open-plan living spaces.
description: A single-story, L-shaped brick and white house with large windows, flat roof, and a small landscaped yard. The design combines modern and traditional elements, featuring open-plan interiors and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the brick facade, main entryway, and a series of large windows, with interior rooms and a green yard visible behind.
description_view_1: From this angle, the L-shape is clear, showing the side brick wall, a cluster of rooms, and a landscaped area with trees.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the white-walled section, multiple room divisions, and a partial view of the green yard.
description_view_3: This view shows the rear and side of the house, with more white exterior walls, a window, and a glimpse into the interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, and direct path; minimal decorative elements.
